productDisplayName: Spykar Men Navy Blue Check Shirt
description: CompositionRed and blue checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-sleeve buttoned closure, buttoned front placket, patch pocket with buttoned flap, branding in rubber print on the left chest and curved hemline FitComfort Wash careMachine wash in warm water at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorations Stylish to the hilt, this checked shirt from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this cool shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and suede shoes to be the king of casual wear.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
